summary: subagent Rust 代码需 cargo fmt + clippy 修复 — collapsible-if 等常见问题
decay architecture: filter pipeline → collector → DataStore → dimension → profile, trait-based extension
PRD + tech docs must be written before coding any feature or milestone
fix architectural root causes not individual symptoms — classify ≥2 similar bugs before patching
universal language-agnostic solutions over project-specific hacks, edge cases via .decayrc config
pull model (DataStore+OnceCell) over push model — new data sources add getter, don't change framework
Dimension trait: score+diagnose split causes double query — use single evaluate() with shared intermediate data
source file extensions: LANGUAGE_GROUPS is the only definition, all others must derive from it
Rust #[cfg(test)] inline tests ≠ test file — split line counts, don't reclassify entire file
text matching only for coarse filtering; precise semantic checks need structured parsing (serde_json etc)
trait defines lifecycle boundary not implementation template — evaluate() is the only contract, internals are self-determined
